name: 1q21_1_distal_NBPF_NOTCH2NL
description: 1q21.1 distal segmental-duplication block (BP3-BP4) harbouring NBPF/Olduvai-domain genes and NOTCH2NL paralogs (A/B/C/R). Site of the recurrent 1q21.1 distal microdeletion/duplication syndrome; SDs flanking the unique core mediate non-allelic homologous recombination. NOTCH2NLA/B/C are human-specific paralogs of NOTCH2 with >99% identity.

architecture.internal_structure: Direct-orientation SD blocks flanking a ~1.35 Mb unique segment; NBPF copies in tandem clusters with Olduvai (DUF1220) domain expansions; NOTCH2NL paralogs A/B/C plus the centromeric NOTCH2 progenitor share >99% identity over tens of kb.
